title: My Take | A humane Chinese AI versus a dog-eat-dog American AI
description: From killing jobs to killing people, the vision of artificial intelligence supremacy in the United States is truly terrifying.
content: There is no artificial intelligence (AI) race to dominate the technology except in the minds of America’s billionaire tech bros and the ruling elites in Washington. Unfortunately, the global news media often uncritically adopt this dog-eat-dog narrat... [1972 chars]

title: AI hits college grad jobs hard, ServiceNow CEO says

content:

title: Tech hiring in 2026: AI growth, fewer roles, new skills
description: The technology job market is entering a new phase. Artificial intelligence is changing how companies hire, the roles they create and the skills they value. While firms continue to invest in AI, the shift is not smooth.
content: The technology job market in 2026 is entering a phase of mixed signals. Companies continue to speak about the power of artificial intelligence to improve productivity, yet many are still struggling to use the technology at scale. At the same time, fi... [3555 chars]

title: Boulder County and state courts prepare, as AI becomes norm in daily life
description: Artificial intelligence is not just already here: it has been for some time. In May 2023, The New York Times reported that a man’s lawyer submitted a totally AI-generated brief in a New York wrongful injury lawsuit against an airline accused.
content:
In May 2023, an attorney submitted an AI-generated brief in a New York wrongful injury lawsuit against Colombia-based airline Avianca.

title: What Is AGI? The AI Goal Everyone Talks About But No One Can Clearly Define
description: Experts say artificial general intelligence lacks a clear definition or arrival point, despite promises from Silicon Valley and abroad.
content:
In brief
Artificial general intelligence refers to AI that can learn and reason across many tasks.
Researchers say today’s chatbots are powerful but still far from true general intelligence.
Experts disagree on when AGI might arrive or how anyone wou... [6137 chars]

title: Colorado lawmakers, at midpoint, still face deep cuts, tough debates
description: At the midpoint of the Colorado legislature's session, debates are underway on immigration, gun bills and tax policy. But lawmakers still face big decisions on budget cuts and artificial intelligence.
content:
Lawmakers are halfway through the 2026 legislative session — and probably 75% of their work remains.

title: Fake AI images, videos fooled many after Michigan tornadoes. Why that’s a problem.
description: Deadly tornadoes last week left behind a trail of artificial intelligence images and videos that went viral online. Experts say it's only going to get worse.
content:
